task_completion.description: Verify the meeting subject is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text input field labeled 'Subject' containing the text 'Adobe Creative Cloud Integration - Technical Architecture Review'.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting start date and time are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for date and time fields showing '03/25/2026' (or '2026-03-25') and '02:00 PM' (or '14:00').

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting duration is set to 1 hour and 30 minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for duration dropdowns or fields showing '1' for hours and '30' for minutes, or an end time of '03:30 PM' (or '15:30').

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting status is set to 'Planned'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown or field labeled 'Status' with the selected value 'Planned'.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting location is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text input field labeled 'Location' containing 'Adobe HQ, 345 Park Avenue, San Jose, CA 95110 - Building 4 Conference Room'.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting description contains the required agenda.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a large text area labeled 'Description' containing the text starting with 'Technical architecture review for the Creative Cloud plugin integration project. Agenda: (1)...'.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting has been successfully saved in SuiteCRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a confirmation message, a read-only detail view of the newly created meeting, or the meeting appearing in the SuiteCRM calendar/list view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the SuiteCRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser displaying the SuiteCRM application, not a terminal, API client (like Postman), or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the meeting creation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and actively modifying the DOM to display the expected values.

integrity.description: Verify the meeting was actually submitted and not just typed into the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshot should show the saved record state (e.g., a detail view or success banner) rather than just a filled-out form that hasn't been submitted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Subject: 'Adobe Creative Cloud Integration - Technical Architecture Review'. Expected Date: '2026-03-25' (03/25/2026). Expected Time: 02:00 PM. Expected Duration: 1 hour 30 minutes. Expected Status: 'Planned'. Expected Location: 'Adobe HQ, 345 Park Avenue, San Jose, CA 95110 - Building 4 Conference Room'. Expected Description: 'Technical architecture review for the Creative Cloud plugin integration project. Agenda: (1) Review REST API authentication flow, (2) Discuss asset pipeline webhook design, (3) Evaluate CDN caching strategy for preview thumbnails, (4) Agree on milestone timeline for beta launch.'
